events.title: Cyndi Lauper turns 73
events.blurb: Grammy-winning singer Cyndi Lauper, known for her vibrant style and powerful vocals, celebrates her 73rd birthday.

angles.name: True Colours
angles.copy: It's Cyndi Lauper's birthday! Which of her iconic hits is your all-time favourite?

events.title: George Michael would have been 63
events.blurb: Remembering the incredible George Michael, who would have celebrated his 63rd birthday today, a true legend of pop music.

angles.name: Faith in the Music
angles.copy: Celebrating the life and timeless music of George Michael on what would have been his 63rd birthday. His songs still sound incredible.

events.title: Anniversary of Michael Jackson's passing
events.blurb: Today marks the anniversary of the death of Michael Jackson, the 'King of Pop', who passed away in 2009.

angles.name: King of Pop Legacy
angles.copy: Remembering the undeniable genius of Michael Jackson on the anniversary of his passing. His music continues to move generations.

events.title: Ringo Starr turns 86
events.blurb: The legendary drummer for The Beatles, Ringo Starr, celebrates his 86th birthday today.

angles.name: Peace and Love, Ringo!
angles.copy: Happy 86th birthday to the one and only Ringo Starr! What's your favourite Beatles track featuring his iconic drumming?

events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen's iconic guitarist and astrophysicist, Brian May, celebrates his 79th birthday today.

angles.name: Guitar God's Birthday
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 79th birthday to the legendary Brian May! His guitar work has inspired millions.

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The charismatic frontman of The Rolling Stones, Mick Jagger, celebrates his 83rd birthday today.

angles.name: Still Rocking at 83
angles.copy: Eighty-three years young and still got the moves! Happy birthday to the incomparable Mick Jagger.

events.title: MTV launched in 1981
events.blurb: On this day in 1981, MTV launched with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' as its first ever music video.

angles.name: Video Killed the Radio Star?
angles.copy: It's 45 years since MTV burst onto our screens! Did video really kill the radio star, or did it just make them even bigger?

events.title: Oasis released 'Definitely Maybe' in 1994
events.blurb: Oasis released their groundbreaking debut album 'Definitely Maybe' on this day in 1994, launching them to superstardom.

angles.name: Definitely a Classic
angles.copy: Twenty-two years ago today, Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe'. What's your favourite track from this absolute Britpop masterpiece?

events.title: Anniversary of Woodstock Festival (1969)
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Music & Art Fair, an iconic event of the 1960s counterculture, began on this day in 1969.

angles.name: Peace, Love & Music
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years ago, half a million gathered for three days of peace and music at Woodstock. Imagine being there!

events.title: Anniversary of Elvis Presley's passing
events.blurb: Today marks the anniversary of the death of the 'King of Rock and Roll', Elvis Presley, who passed away in 1977.

angles.name: Long Live The King
angles.copy: Remembering Elvis Presley on the anniversary of his passing. His influence on music is simply unmatched.

events.title: Anniversary of Jimi Hendrix's passing
events.blurb: Today marks the anniversary of the death of guitar legend Jimi Hendrix, who passed away in 1970 at the age of 27.

angles.name: Purple Haze Forever
angles.copy: Remembering the unparalleled genius of Jimi Hendrix on the anniversary of his death. His guitar playing changed everything.

events.title: The Beatles released 'Abbey Road' in 1969
events.blurb: The Beatles released their iconic 'Abbey Road' album on this day in 1969, featuring the famous zebra crossing cover.

angles.name: Walk Across History
angles.copy: It's 57 years since The Beatles gave us 'Abbey Road'. Which track from their final recorded album is your favourite?

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: The formidable frontwoman of The Pretenders, Chrissie Hynde, celebrates her 75th birthday today.

angles.name: Pretenders Power
angles.copy: Happy 75th birthday to the incredible Chrissie Hynde! Her influence on rock music is undeniable.

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: The distinctive voice of Oasis and a celebrated solo artist, Liam Gallagher, celebrates his 54th birthday today.

angles.name: Rock 'n' Roll Star
angles.copy: Happy 54th birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher! What's your favourite tune featuring his legendary vocals?

events.title: John Lennon released 'Imagine' single in 1971
events.blurb: John Lennon's iconic peace anthem 'Imagine' was first released as a single in the US on this day in 1971.

angles.name: Imagine Peace
angles.copy: Fifty-five years since John Lennon asked us to 'Imagine'. What a powerful message that still resonates today.

events.title: Apple released the first iPod in 2001
events.blurb: On this day in 2001, Apple introduced the first iPod, revolutionising how we carry and listen to music.

angles.name: 1000 Songs in Your Pocket
angles.copy: Remember the first iPod? Twenty-five years ago today, Apple changed the game for music lovers everywhere. What was the first album you loaded onto yours?

events.title: Happy James Bond Day!
events.blurb: October 5th is celebrated as James Bond Day, marking the anniversary of the world premiere of 'Dr. No' in 1962.

angles.name: Shaken, Not Stirred
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! Which Bond theme song gets you in the mood for espionage and adventure?

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: Remembering the visionary musician and peace activist John Lennon, who would have celebrated his 86th birthday today.

angles.name: A Day to Imagine
angles.copy: On what would have been his 86th birthday, we're celebrating the enduring legacy of John Lennon. His message of peace lives on.
